reviews.review_description: I honestly do not know why this game is free. This game is an absolute masterpiece. Very enthralling story, which kept me invested all the way through, pretty good graphics, AMAZING score, just overall an EXTREMELY great game. I highly reccommend.
DUDE GET THIS GAME RN I DONE ALL ThE levels AND I LOVED HOW IS this vr game FREE GET IT BEST GRAPHICS GAME

-- Update Feb 15, 2026

I think I spent 14+ hours playing this game and LOVED IT!!!

There was one chapter (the one involving the water pump)  in the game where Hope's game play dialogue was a bit goofy and didn't seem like the same character except in the cut scenes. 
----


99% of games I play are FPS.  For whatever reason, the description and trailer for this game got me curious.  I just started playing it today and having a lot of fun even though I keep getting caught.  For now. 

Highly recommend you try it!

This game is huge and clearly a ton of work went into the story and lore. Really cool mechanics - you are hacking into a security system to guide a prisoner to escape.

This is not your typical cash grab or shovelware free game, this is worth your time.

Really enjoyed this game!!  It's all about patience & stealth.  I could not stop playing.  Even though I have finished the game, I plan to go back to start a new game and have another go at it from the beginning.  The ending though...ughhh.
This game is AWESOME.. I FINISHED ALL LEVELS AND RESTARTED AGAIN MONTHS LATER.. THEY LITERALLY NEED A PART 2.. PLEASEEEEEEE
I have not seen this game before but I am going to rate this 5 star
Thought that the game was amazing and for th fact that its free
I loved playing this game in my first oculus, now I'm so happy I can play it on my new quest 3!!! even i need to start the game again. 😁
Maybe I’m just confused in my old age, but I can’t even manage to get her safely around the corner at the start of the game; she always gets caught by the security guard. Lol. 😝 ￼
I am looking for more games like it, amazing concept

reviews.review_title: the best game ever in existence 100/100
reviews.review_description: this game is truly amazing with its long story and how much lore there i love its story line, i love the option choosing, i love the cut scenes, and the puzzles you have to do but there's one thing i don't understand this game is way too good to be free i love it music and dialogue and at the end i stayed through and look for all the credits while listening to a beautiful song. it's sucks that  ( spoiler warning ) hope died at the end. i shed a tear at the end because the game was so peak and amazing well thinking about are there cool and fun times It's was really cool that you can collect items like disks and tapes and the tv outlines colored in yellow left by the developers it's shows some images of what they worked and what they did while talking to the other developers of how the game could be in certain parts. this game is a true work of art.

reviews.review_title: Forget the hate. Great acting and story.
reviews.review_description: Spoiled and numbed children will write a negative review about this game. It deserves a paid sequel. Excellent casting, direction, and story.
Amazingly well-done free VR game, which seems to be extremely rare. Good story, graphics and overall the concept works excellent in VR. Definitely and highly recommended.

It really doesn't deserve all the hate. Did not encounter any game breaking bugs during my whole playthrough, they must have fixed them. Starts off a bit slow, graphics are dated, gameplay kind of clunky, but top notch voice acting and decent story. First 3 chapters are very similar in gameplay but 4th and 5th changes things up. Stealth games fans will enjoy this. For a free game I can't really complain about much with a full length title I enjoyed.
Just wished it had more levels to it was really bumped out it was over 😔

reviews.review_title: It was so good I was addicted.
reviews.review_description: I don’t know why people hate on it so much, but I think the way the game was built was cool. Although it was difficult to understand the story without reading up on it online. The concept of the story was interesting once you understand. I’d recommend the game to any one who would enjoy the way the game is designed. This is my first time writing a review for a game and I only did it because the game gets a lot of hate even though it’s such a good game and deserves a much higher rating.
It is pretty cool but I’d rather it be a first person VR game rather than a third person game
I own a version of this game on PlayStation, iOS, Mac, and now Meta Quest. Definitely worth it.

reviews.review_title: This is free?????? It is too good !
reviews.review_description: I just played this game for an hour, and it’s absolutely incredible! If you're into shooters or action-packed games, this one might not be for you. It’s a stealth game that makes you think, and it's like nothing I've ever experienced before! You take on the role of a guide, helping a brave girl escape from a sinister facility while sneaking past guards. The thrill of hiding and strategizing is so unique and exhilarating—I'm hooked!
Thought the game was super fun and a cool story to follow. I did get stuck multiple times but figured everything out eventually. As long as you're patient you'll like this game!
Stuck immediately not sure what to do

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite game oat
reviews.review_description: This game is actually really good and the story was very interesting while playing. I may have not liked the click to move for movement but I could get past it.
Didn’t like the third person at all
The best game EVER!! I love everything about it! Why it's sad the ending when Hope sui*ide herself? It almost make me 😭. I wonder if there are more endings...

I am about to get ac nexus and I thought this was going to be a temporary placeholder but this was not what i was expecting the 2d movement Is very confusing if this was a 1 person experience it would have been better👎👎👎
Fun

reviews.review_title: Finished it, got withdrawal!!! Need more
reviews.review_description: The first game I got into, kept saying to the kids...I need to go on the VR and save my girl. Loved the omni view features and think this can go further...need a sequel please!!! I am now trying to find a similar game and I just cant! Love it

reviews.review_title: The most underrated game in the Store
reviews.review_description:
A great mix of Metal Gear and Resident Evil, enhanced with topical issues, excellent acting, and an engaging plot.

This is a real adult game, not just another silly amusement.

The main issue with this game is that it's a port from a phone, so sometimes it's not very convenient for playing in VR. I'm also a bit disappointed with the fifth episode, but it doesn't spoil the overall impression of the game.
I was bored out of my mind, I think I would rather watch paint dry.
Really like what they have done here. It really feels good as a relaxing game that still keeps you engaged.
Stuck in the room with the pictures and fire

I like this. After a slightly frustrating few minutes getting used to the controls, it's a really good game. More puzzle than action, it's an enjoyable mission of sneaking around. It is a bit unbelievable that after you pepper spray a security guard they don't seem to give chase or alert anyone, but if they did the game would become unplayable in its current form, and need to have totally different mechanics. For free especially, this is totally worth trying out.

reviews.review_title: Love this game (I’m not a bot)
reviews.review_description: I haven’t finished this game but I played for an hour and I was only 1 percent done. This game is so good for being free. And the puzzles aren’t to hard. I recommend this completely. I loved this game so much I made my friend play it so they could experience it too, keep it up! 👍

4 stars only caus cant get past 4 and no way to move past itI flipped out when cost was free and story awesome so unique BUT and I kmw it's older game wishing possible to update so can finish it stuck at level 4 when u hav to choose pic and dislodge( pics of comic books and tabor and skeleton poster is where  that doesn't  match for moning bell paper tried for hou and none wk anyone else havingnproblems and is there a solution or way to get past it? Any info would b great loved game perfect need part 2 plzz
When I got this game I thought I was getting a decent game not just junk taking up storage.
It’s not that good but some things are good but some are not good but it’s a good game for new users
Loved this game and replayed it many times trying to get a happy ending for Hope but I've never gotten one 😢

I've been playing for 2 days and binged it so much that I beat a chapter a day. I love puzzle games, and this one is great and free! The storyline could be better, but only one complaint for a free game isn't bad. I'm addicted!

reviews.review_title: We Need A Sequel  to Republique.
reviews.review_description: This is the first game I've played and still find myself revisiting it, we definitely need a sequel to this . I've played games with higher ratings and still some just don't stand up to the levels of enjoyment of Republique, great story, great game play, great graphics..
Ending sucked

I loved the game! They found a perfect way to put you on the 3D world, but w/o movements that could cause motion sickness.
It's an amazing tactical game, where you help a rebellion member to scape from a militar facility in a dystopian world.
You're a hacker using cameras and devices to help and orient the fugitive!
Download it now! Seriously.

DEAR DEVS, IM A BIG FAN OF MGS AND THIS GAME GAVE ME WHAT I WANTED! EVEN GETTING DAVID HAYTER HIMSELF TO VOICE ACT IS AMAZING! I LOVE THIS GAME! 

And now, dear players. This game is worth the play through, the voice acting is amazing, sound effects are great, story is AWESOME, and if you like stealth games you’ll LOVE this!

reviews.review_title: To the people who hate the final chapter
reviews.review_description:
I don’t understand why so many people are hating on this game just because chapter 5 is unplayable. If you hate this game because of the game itself and not solely because of chapter 5 then I’m completely fine with that. But to the people who do hate it solely because of chapter 5, I have a message for you:

Why? Just because chapter 5 is unplayable doesn’t mean it’s a 1 star by default. Everything else about the game (at least to me) is phenomenal, and your crying about it just because of a single chapter? You clearly liked the game enough to play through the whole thing, which mind you is 8 hours long minimum, so why are you hating on it? You may make the argument that, ‘Chapter 5 being unplayable ruined my experience and I don’t get to see, mainly play, the end of Hope’s story’, to which, although I agree, (at least the second part) doesn’t mean the game is a one star. I’m not saying that chapter 5 being unplayable isn’t bad, that is a problem they need to fix, which is why I’m giving it a four star. NOT A ONE.

Speaking of which, some of you have been saying the developers “don’t care about this game”. Do you even KNOW about the dev logs? There are dev logs hidden throughout the entire game that you can enable in the settings menu and share little pieces of the games production. Does that sound like developers that don’t care? Hell, the first dev log of every chapter includes the whole crew thanking the player for playing this far into the game. Not to mention the entire game is a tribute to classic stealth games, such as Metal Gear Solid. Again, does THAT sound like a dev team that doesn’t care? Sure, they made a mistake In chapter 5 (which I don’t understand how slipped past development), but that doesn’t mean they don’t care. 

No one seems to even consider the fact that THE GAME IS FREE. Sure not on the quest, but just go to the oculus app and switch to the Rift’s games and you’ll have it. They didn’t have to make it free, they could have just priced it at 9.99 and called it a day. But they didn’t. They decided to make it free so more people could enjoy and experience their game, which I bet some of you did. 

This game was made out of love, and I’m sure all the backlash took them harshly. So next time you rate a game a 1 star solely because the last segment doesn’t work, think we’ll and hard on if it’s a fair judgement. Thank you for listening to my TedTalk.

reviews.review_title: Looks amazing but can’t start the game
reviews.review_description: The graphics are amazing, but I can’t start the game. It starts me out at the desk and every click just enlarges the phone. Am I doing something wrong?

reviews.review_title: Five stars if not for the crash at ep. 5
reviews.review_description:
The story is pretty well told, although listening to tapes etc is boring, and the challenges are just right (not frustrating). There are some minor gameplay flaws but overall I got well sucked into the story. I spent 10 hours playing episodes 1-4 which is an amazing value for money!
But then it crashed a few times at the start of episode 5 and now my savegame won't even load and there's no one to turn to :-( Hence only 3 stars.

reviews.review_title: old school metal gear solid style game
reviews.review_description:
This is a stealth game that feels like a movie.
It has standard camera views that you switch to (like in Chronos VR, or old PS1 resident evil)
I somehow got this for free. I never purchased it because the first set of reviews upon release weren't that great. Now that I've finished episode one, I know I would have purchased it.
I really enjoy games that tells stories and feel like you're playing in a movie. This game gives me that feeling. 
I'm also a risk averse person, so sneaking around games are hard for me. If you want something where you go in guns blazing, this is not for you.

Great game overall so far I really enjoy it
It’s not the best scheme I thought it was going to be a survival game in first person so yeah

Game is exciting and fun. Up until level 5 and it keeps crashing. I cant believe the game is even still aval.  Since reviews have been pretty much the same pointing out the bugs. Would be great if the devs could get there act together and fix the bug and possibly add more levels ..

reviews.review_title: What is Camouflaj trying to teach me?
reviews.review_description:
Thanks for the game ... that crashes hopelessly at chapter 5 - so I can't complete it.
Is this to be expected for Camouflaj products? - do you just ignore serious issues like this?
Please fix.

I'm stuck at the part where your phone is dead and I'm told there should be a charger in my room. I looked at each of the two cameras but there's nothing in my room to charge the phone.

If I have to Google up the solution every single time a simple thing needs to be done, I'm not going to go through with it. Sorry, but I regret buying this game.
It's not good you don't even play as a player your just on a phone helping some one escape

This game is great until it crashes and you can't go any further. This is criminal at this point ripping people off. THEY NEED TO FIX THIS I've sent several emails and no one is responding. Trifling! That star don't count.

reviews.review_title: Enjoyed it unril the last episode
reviews.review_description:
Why didnt the development team test this on Quest 2? Enough players have fed back that episode 5 crashes yet nothing has been done or seems to be getting done. 

I cannot recommend this game as others will feel as disappointed as me when they cannot complete it because of the bug. Sort it out guys - give us a way of skipping the REALLY long cut scene and play the rest of the episode.

I keep trying to play this game, but it crashes more and more as I'm progressing through the game. No kidding, I've been kicked out from the game AT LEAST 20 times! And I'm stuck on a 15min cutscene (ending? I don't know!) that I can't skip and the game crashes at random moments! Then I reopen the game and I have to watch it AGAIN AND AGAIN hoping that this time the game doesn't crash. BUT IT CRASHES! I'm tired of trying. I don't wanna try anymore. I don't want to know the ending anymore. I lost the interest. I'm sick of it. This game has 2 YEARS and they haven't fixed it yet! DEVS, WHAT IS WRONG WITH YOU? Remove this thing from the store until you fix it!

I found this game to be amazing. It may not make the best use of the VR functionality out there but the story is fantastic, the game is really polished, I have run into any issues. Most importantly, it is by far the longest game I’ve played on the oculus. Definitely recommend.

reviews.review_title: Good game but horrible developer support
reviews.review_description:
The game itself is alright, the voice acting is solid and the stealth missions are also well implemented.
However the soundtrack links in the Android version of this game have been broken for months following the closure of Google play music. 
And since the developers apparently ain't willing to fix that I have no other choice but to give this game 1 star until they finally started doing what they should've done months ago had they actually listened to me instead of ignoring me.

A hacker stealth game that feels and looks like Watch_Dogs and Splinter Cell had a child in a hospital where VR games are born. Your view of the game is via CCTV cameras that you have hacked, giving you higher control of the facility around you as you progress. Your overall mission is to help a recently locked up girl called Hope escape from her captivity while learning some pretty alarming secrets along the way. You indirectly control Hope by aiming at structures and items around her (tasers, pepper spray, collectables, items of intel etc.) - all while avoiding being caught by the armed guards.

The game is very story-driven, each person and item in the game has a story behind it, so if you’re into the deeper stories of the worlds your games are set in then République has a lot to offer. The graphics are decent enough and consistent regardless of what is being rendered. It's hard to explain the game without giving too many spoilers but what’s exciting about the gameplay is that you are only an observer, Hope’s reactions to the world and people around her are limited to your direction, so if you make a mistake you have a limited time to correct it before Hope is caught and your mission is failed – however, if you take the time and plan out your next moves, things should mostly go your way.

République brings a fresh perspective to the world of VR games and offers as many opportunities as it does limitations to unique gameplay. If you aren’t a fan of stealth titles then the only other pillar you can lean on is the story, since the hacking and action elements aren’t enough to keep you invested on their own and there aren’t too many style mix-ups to keep you on your toes. But for fans of the genres, République is a solid title with plenty of polish and optimised well for the various headsets it supports.

Read the full review and more here: https://www.opiumpulses.com/article/315/10-oculus-quest-new-release-reviews-p3

Great and very detailed story. On the surface it is about a nice teenage girl trying to escape a weird, complex and at times beautiful place. The story can also be enjoyed at a deeper level such as the psychology of a dictator as he justifies his actions. The graphics is among the best on the Quest. I gave it 4 stars because of the ending of the story. I was supposed to have different choices and different endings accordingly, but I found that regardless of my choice of action for the girl the ending was the same.
What a waste of money...  won’t even work

I would not have bought this if I knew casting was blocked on this game. VR is usually an activity that friends and family watch and take turns playing and it sucks that you can only play all by yourself.

reviews.review_title: Irritating to say the very least
reviews.review_description: I'm tired of devs blocking the ability to cast their games, it's extremely bad customer service. I don't care if the game is decent, if it does not cast I will give it 1 star and advise all against it, vr is mostly a solo experience that will remain in the dark to alot of people due to this selfish constraint, the ability to cast can bring a game to a group experience and allow people that have little to no experience in vr to see, and learn.

I bought this game the day it came out and loved it. I got to mission 3 and lost all upgrades. I emailed support multiple times with no response.

Word to wise: you cannot
 count on support..buyer beware if you have an issue with game you are out of luck, to bad I can’t get my money back.

Days later still nothing, I have deleted game and will never buy from developer again due to worst support ever!

developer_response.body: Hi Billy! Apologies for the delay in our response. We've responded to your issue and are waiting to hear back. I think we can get your issue resolved, so keep in touch! Thanks so much.

reviews.review_description: Love this game but stuck on chapter 2. In the library office at the. Moment

I loved this game! It kept me interested and had plenty of puzzles & things for me to explore and find! I even went back after almost finishing, just to see how many things I could pickpocket off the guards! 😂 I  am hoping they make more games like this!

I recently finished Moss and I Expect You to Die and was looking for another high quality sit down game and Republique VR delivers. This game seems fully optimized for VR to me. You are able to control your 3D character in a 3D environment similar to the perspective in Moss. In Republique however you will have much more variety in perspective as you take control of security cameras and navigate the beautiful map and phone interface. The character interaction is point and click and offers a variety of stealth and tactical options. Lots of fun. Vivid story and voice acting. Headphones are a must for me. Playing as a hacker who’s viewpoint originates from various security cameras in the environment really lends itself to the Quest field of view for a more naturally immersive experience.
The only thing I don't like is the ending. Everything else was superb.

Got into this game really fast. I like it a lot but got to chapter 3 got the blue key card and know the game is broken and will not let me reenter the room where I use the blue key card. Wet backthrough the entire map and the one place I need to be the game no longer will load it. Would love to finish this game it is a good one. Any assistants would be appreciated. Update. uninstalled the game and re-installed lost both chapter 2 and 3 progress and am back to my very first save progress. Unfortunately it will be a while before I play this again. Hate losing hours of game play. Still really enjoyed what this game has to offer. Everything has its issues.
It will not let me install it

This game is underrated in my opinion. There's hours and hours of game play, lots of detail, a good storyline and decent graphics. Those who like Moss will like the 3rd party role in this and the fact that you can play this game seated. This game plays like Moss w/ less music and more fascism. Get it, you won't be disappointed. I've been playing about 3-4 hours and the game has not crashed or had any major errors. Those complaining about the game asking them to move into the play area should reset their guardian view. Given the surveillance cameras you navigate are by the wall, you will need to make sure the play area is in front of you. Once the game begins you will not be able to sit back much as a result.
I love this game!  the concept,  the different objectives that need to be completed.  Absolutely one of my favorites.  This game is a must gamers!

I’m not sure about the reviewers giving this ga
me stellar reviews? Are they real? Not my style of gameplay and it looks like rehash of on old Nintendo game. With that said not stellar. I’ll give it three stars for the people who like this kind of gameplay.

The game is good, original game play, nice graphics with excellent 3D, interesting story...

But, at the beggining of 5th episode, in a scene where Zager appears in the screens, it crashes over and over again. No way to jump or avoid the crashes, so the game can't be finished.

I'd recommend it, but I can't... If this bug is fixed in the future, I'll be glad to change this review.

I started playing this on my ipad but eventually got bored. This time i cannot stop playing. Vr gives omnivision a whole new feeling and makes the plot so much richer and funny to experience and unravel. Such an amazing experience. I Definitely recommend to give it a try.

￼This is a beautifully made stealth game that requires thinking and rationalization, some puzzle solving, obtaining clues, interactive movie, data collection and selling. When you sell information, you can buy various equipment that greatly improves your game progression. So do not rush through, collect everything you can and just enjoy! The game is pretty long, it has five chapters, and I put over 20 hours in it. It’s very entertaining and fun. The graphics is fantastic, no glitches, everything runs smoothly and overall very impressive. The story development is amazing. 
I did not encounter any crashes. I read reviews ppl were complaining, but those issues must’ve been￼￼ recently fixed. Great job devs!
I finished this game in 8 hours, but I'm sad because I probably won't be able to find another game like this :(
It’s keeping crashing!!!

I would give more stars but when I got to the 5th and final level, the game would crash after the opening scene. I tried resetting/restarting my oculus, but it still repeated the crash. Only thing I could do is delete and restart from the very beginning. Very frustrating not being able to complete, save my progress, or start at level 5 after reinstalling. I tied email game developer but no response back. There is no support if you have issues.
Absolutely amazing!
